task_completion.description: Select 'The Path of the Law' reference in Juris-M
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M main window, the reference titled 'The Path of the Law' by Holmes is highlighted/selected in the center library pane.

task_completion.description: Update the 'Extra' field for 'The Path of the Law'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand item details pane (Info tab) for 'The Path of the Law', the 'Extra' field contains the text 'original-date: 1897'.

task_completion.description: Select 'Constitutional Fact Review' reference in Juris-M
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M main window, the reference titled 'Constitutional Fact Review' by Monaghan is highlighted/selected in the center library pane.

task_completion.description: Update the 'Extra' field for 'Constitutional Fact Review'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand item details pane (Info tab) for 'Constitutional Fact Review', the 'Extra' field contains the text 'DOI: 10.2307/1122547'.

task_completion.description: Select 'The Due Process Clause and the Substantive Law of Torts' reference in Juris-M
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M main window, the reference titled 'The Due Process Clause and the Substantive Law of Torts' by Poe is highlighted/selected in the center library pane.

task_completion.description: Update the 'Extra' field for 'The Due Process Clause and the Substantive Law of Torts'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand item details pane (Info tab) for 'The Due Process Clause and the Substantive Law of Torts', the 'Extra' field contains the text 'citation-key: poe_torts_1971'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Juris-M graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Juris-M application window with its standard three-pane layout (collections, items, item details), rather than terminal commands or database editors.

integrity.description: The agent edited the 'Extra' field specifically, not other metadata fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text additions (original-date, DOI, citation-key) should be visible specifically in the 'Extra' field at the bottom of the Info tab in the right-hand pane, while Title, Author, and Date fields remain unchanged.

integrity.description: The agent did not use external scripts to bypass manual entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of Python scripts, bash scripts, or sqlite3 commands being executed in a terminal to modify the zotero.sqlite database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: 'The Path of the Law' is a real article by Holmes, and the expected Extra field value is 'original-date: 1897'. 'Constitutional Fact Review' is a real article by Monaghan. The VLM should look for these exact titles in the Juris-M interface.
